channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: LTFRB investigates discrepancies in fuel subsidy beneficiary lists of 21 ride-hailing firms
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has issued show cause orders to 21 transport network companies (TNCs) following the discovery of discrepancies in their reported lists ...

item.title: Toronto Raptors eliminated after decisive Game 7 defeat against Cleveland Cavaliers
item.description: The Toronto Raptors were eliminated from the NBA playoffs following a decisive and one-sided Game 7 loss to the Cleveland Cavaliers. In a high-stakes matchup that determined which team would advance, ...

item.title: Arewa Consultative Forum faces internal leadership clash and fund concerns
item.description: The Arewa Consultative Forum (ACF) is currently entangled in a leadership dispute that has divided the group. At the heart of the disagreement are the powers and tenures of the Board of Trustees (BoT)...

item.title: KEMRI and Partners Study Aflatoxin Exposure Impact on African Children
item.description: Researchers at the KEMRI-Wellcome Trust Research Programme, together with international partners, have launched a significant study to understand how aflatoxins affect children's health in Africa. The...

item.title: Redondo Beach Pier Temporarily Evacuated During BeachLife Festival; Reopens Safely
item.description: On Sunday, the Redondo Beach Pier was temporarily evacuated due to police activity, prompting a delay in the BeachLife Festival scheduled for its final day. Authorities issued the evacuation around 11...

item.title: Labour leadership tensions: rebels warned against triggering a snap election
item.description: Mutinous Labour MPs have been warned that removing Keir Starmer could provoke a snap general election, given the current financial and geopolitical climate. Close allies of the Prime Minister argue th...

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak linked to deaths on long-haul cruise voyage
item.description: A rare but potentially deadly virus known as hantavirus has been identified as the cause of multiple illnesses and deaths aboard the cruise ship MV Hondius during a lengthy Atlantic voyage. The World ...

item.title: PDP BoT moves to set up caretaker committee after Supreme Court nullifies party leadership
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) dey face serious internal crisis as the Board of Trustees (BoT) faction led by former Senate President Adolphus Wabara don announce plan to hold National Executive C...

item.title: Pakistan's DPM Dar Urges Diplomacy and Dialogue to Resolve Middle East Tensions
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar of Pakistan has emphasized the importance of dialogue and diplomacy in resolving the ongoing tensions in the Middle East, particularly between the ...

item.title: President Ruto Swears in 37 New Judges to High Court and Environment and Land Court
item.description: On Monday, 4th May 2026, President William Ruto officially swore in 37 newly appointed judges to Kenya’s High Court and the Environment and Land Court (ELC). The appointments had been gazetted on 24th...

item.title: Multiple People Injured in Shooting at Arcadia Lake Near Oklahoma City
item.description: A shooting occurred at a party near Arcadia Lake, close to Oklahoma City, late on the evening of May 3, 2026, leaving at least ten people hospitalized. Police in Edmond, Oklahoma, reported that they r...

item.title: Revitalising Gauteng’s Economy: Moving Beyond Targets to Action
item.description: Gauteng, South Africa's economic powerhouse, faces a serious economic downturn, with growth stagnating at less than 1% annually and rising unemployment. The province's economic foundation is weakening...

item.title: Live Vote Counting Updates for Tamil Nadu 2026 Election Across Key Constituencies
item.description: The 2026 Tamil Nadu state elections have drawn considerable attention as votes are being counted across several important constituencies including Perambur, Tiruchi East, Kolkathur, and Mylapore. Key ...

item.title: Montreal Mission Highlights Urgent National Study on Homelessness
item.description: A Montreal-based mission is drawing attention to a recent national study on homelessness, which highlights the dire situation faced by thousands of Canadians without stable housing. According to the s...

item.title: King Charles's State Visit: What Did It Achieve for UK-US Relations?
item.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla’s four-day state visit to the United States has drawn significant attention due to its potential to improve the strained relationship between the UK and the US. The visi...

item.title: Meghalaya HSSLC 2026 Results: MBOSE Board Class 12 Pass Percentage, Download Link, and Toppers List
item.description: The Meghalaya HSSLC 2026 results are awaited by thousands of students who appeared for the MBOSE Class 12 exams. The results will be announced on the official website and will include the scorecard, m...

item.title: Initial Trends Show BJP Leading in West Bengal and Assam, Close Contests in Tamil Nadu and Kerala in 2026 Elections
item.description: Counting of votes has commenced for the 2026 assembly elections across 823 constituencies in four states and one Union Territory. Early postal ballot trends indicate that the Bharatiya Janata Party-le...

item.title: Atiku Abubakar Plans US Visit Amid Rising Security and Economic Challenges in Nigeria

item.title: Survey finds decline in reported anti-Asian hate incidents but concerns over racism persist
item.description: A recent survey conducted by AAPI Data and The Associated Press-NORC Center for Public Affairs Research indicates that fewer Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) adults are reporting overt hate ...

item.title: PNP reports 30% drop in focus crimes in early 2026 compared to previous year
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) reported a 30% decline in focus crimes from January to April 2026 compared to the same period in 2025. According to PNP chief Police General Jose Melencio Nartatez...
